comment: Buttazzo et al. 2013 (arXiv:1307.3536) NNLO fit of the SM couplings at the Planck scale, plus the input pole masses and their uncertainties. lambda(M_Pl) and the M_Pl couplings (eq.61) are linear fits in (M_t, M_h, alpha_s); beta_lambda(M_Pl) is computed at 1-loop from those couplings. TFPT predicts NEAR-CRITICALITY: the double-critical surface lambda(M_Pl)=0 AND beta_lambda(M_Pl)=0.

fit_MPl.comment: couplings at M_Pl (Buttazzo 2013 eq.61); g1 is GUT-normalised (g1^2 = 5/3 g_Y^2)

stability.ref: Buttazzo 2013 eq.65: absolute stability excluded at 2.8 sigma
